case_title: HALDEMAN, GEORGE W. vs. BURDINE, WILLIAM et al

#3 CHAITIN--REPTR CARL SAUCEDA--CC FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. STIPULATED SETTLEMENT REACHED AS FOLLOWS: STIP THAT DEF WILL VACATE PREMISES BY 8AM ON 6-30-93 AND IF SOONER, DEF TO NOTIFY PROPERTY MANAGER. PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS IF DEF VACATES ON TIME. PLTF TO PREPARE STIPULTD JUDGMENT. PLTF MAY PRE-POST EVICTION NOTICE 5 DAYS BEFORE 6-30-93 SO EVICTION CAN OCCUR ON 6-30-93. PLTF TO PREPARRE PAPERS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURDINE, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1029 GEARY STREET, APT #25, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
